mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, line_no, description, rate, rate_qual, rated_currency, exchange_rate, expressed_currency, charge, weight, weight_qual, weight_type, sp_charge_code, sp_charge_desc, equipment_code, equipment_type, total_weight, total_weight_qual, service_code, volume, volume_qual, rated_quantity, rated_package_type, billed_quantity, billed_qualifier, length, width, height, measurement_unit, declared_value, commodity_class, commodity_code, correction_indicator, carriers_description, carriers_quantity, transport_service, origin_zone, destination_zone
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edi_210_charge (invoice_id, line_no, description, rate, rate_qual, rated_currency, exchange_rate, expressed_currency, charge, weight, weight_qual, weight_type, sp_charge_code, sp_charge_desc, equipment_code, equipment_type, total_weight, total_weight_qual, service_code, volume, volume_qual, rated_quantity, rated_package_type, billed_quantity, billed_qualifier, length, width, height, measurement_unit, declared_value, commodity_class, commodity_code, correction_indicator, carriers_description, carriers_quantity, transport_service, origin_zone, destination_zone) VALUES (#{invoiceId}, #{lineNo}, #{description}, #{rate}, #{rateQual}, #{ratedCurrency}, #{exchangeRate}, #{expressedCurrency}, #{charge}, #{weight}, #{weightQual}, #{weightType}, #{spChargeCode}, #{spChargeDesc}, #{equipmentCode}, #{equipmentType}, #{totalWeight}, #{totalWeightQual}, #{serviceCode}, #{volume}, #{volumeQual}, #{ratedQuantity}, #{ratedPackageType}, #{billedQuantity}, #{billedQualifier}, #{length}, #{width}, #{height}, #{measurementUnit}, #{declaredValue}, #{commodityClass}, #{commodityCode}, #{correctionIndicator}, #{carriersDescription}, #{carriersQuantity}, #{transportService}, #{originZone}, #{destinationZone})

INSERT INTO edi_210_charge (invoice_id, line_no, description, rate, rate_qual, rated_currency, exchange_rate, expressed_currency, charge, weight, weight_qual, weight_type, sp_charge_code, sp_charge_desc, equipment_code, equipment_type, total_weight, total_weight_qual, service_code, volume, volume_qual, rated_quantity, rated_package_type, billed_quantity, billed_qualifier, length, width, height, measurement_unit, declared_value, commodity_class, commodity_code, correction_indicator, carriers_description, carriers_quantity, transport_service, origin_zone, destination_zone) VALUES
(#{c.invoiceId}, #{c.lineNo}, #{c.description}, #{c.rate}, #{c.rateQual}, #{c.ratedCurrency}, #{c.exchangeRate}, #{c.expressedCurrency}, #{c.charge}, #{c.weight}, #{c.weightQual}, #{c.weightType}, #{c.spChargeCode}, #{c.spChargeDesc}, #{c.equipmentCode}, #{c.equipmentType}, #{c.totalWeight}, #{c.totalWeightQual}, #{c.serviceCode}, #{c.volume}, #{c.volumeQual}, #{c.ratedQuantity}, #{c.ratedPackageType}, #{c.billedQuantity}, #{c.billedQualifier}, #{c.length}, #{c.width}, #{c.height}, #{c.measurementUnit}, #{c.declaredValue}, #{c.commodityClass}, #{c.commodityCode}, #{c.correctionIndicator}, #{c.carriersDescription}, #{c.carriersQuantity}, #{c.transportService}, #{c.originZone}, #{c.destinationZone})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edi_210_charge WHERE invoice_id = #{invoiceId} ORDER BY line_no, id
